query:
SELECT s.id AS "id!"
              FROM sessions s
              JOIN signins si ON si.session_id = s.id
             WHERE si.user_id = $1
               AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
               AND si.deleted_at IS NULL
               AND (s.deployment_id IS NULL OR s.deployment_id = $2)
             ORDER BY s.updated_at DESC
             LIMIT 1
